title: Civil Staff Engineer Water Resources
description:
Civil Staff Engineer – Water Resources
Rosenberg Associates, St. George, Utah
Job Description
Rosenberg Associates, a civil engineering consulting firm located in St. George, Utah, is seeking applicants for a Civil Staff Engineer with an emphasis in water resources. The applicant would be associated with large, medium, and small projects for private development and local municipalities.  The position would be responsible for completing designated tasks as directed by a senior project engineer.  The position is anticipated to be full-time, Monday through Friday.  Applicant position is to be paid on an hourly wage up to 40 hours per week. Work beyond 40 hours per week is paid at 1.5 times the negotiated wage. A competitive, hourly wage is to be negotiated based on experience, skill set, and previous work applicable to the position.
Job Requirements
Possess ability to learn new skills and software.
Handle multiple projects simultaneously and independently, including prioritizing, organizing, and planning time effectively to meet deadlines.
Possess effective written and verbal communication skills.
Be able to learn and use engineering software for developing hydrologic and hydraulic modeling systems including HEC-HMS, HEC-RAS, and EPA-NET.
Be able to learn and use AutoCAD Civil 3D software platform to prepare site civil construction plans.
Utilize the Microsoft Office and Adobe software platforms.
Perform field measurements and assist with construction observation and management.
Knowledge or ability to learn ArcGIS platforms.
Possess a valid driver's license.  Company vehicle will be provided for travel to job sites, but applicants should have their own vehicle for daily travel to/from office.
Perform other assigned duties as required.
Job Benefits
Paid Leave: The company provides 9 paid holidays per year, plus a starting 96-hour leave time benefit per year to begin accruing upon start of employment.  Leave time accrual increases with tenure up to 208 hours per year.
Flexible Hours: Hours of daily schedule can be negotiated with supervisor depending on need and/or circumstances.
Profit Sharing: Company wide profit sharing is available based on team performance.
401k: A 401k plan is available to employees following one year of employment.  Company will match 100% up to 3% of income, then will match 50% for an additional 2% of income.
Medical Insurance: The company participates in a local health and wellness program paired with a locally sourced medical cost sharing program.  The monthly cost varies depending on the coverage options.
Other Benefits: The company sponsors a group dental plan and group vision plan at a discounted rate for all full-time employees.  The company sponsors a group life insurance plan that includes a $25,000 covered death benefit at no cost to the employee.
Contacts
Please send resume to shannac@racivil.com.  Include a phone number and e-mail point of contact.
